title: Population coverage statement
description: v3 §11.X / v3 Phase 9 — workflow-level statement of which sample cohorts the workflow has been validated on. One file per workflow id at config/population-coverage/<workflow_id>.yaml.

workflow_id.description: Stable archetype/workflow id this statement applies to. Matches the file stem.

validated_cohorts.description: Cohorts the workflow was evaluated on. Must carry at least one entry.

explicitly_untested.description: Cohorts known to be outside validation scope. Surfaces in the UI as an explicit gap so the SME sees what was tested but NOT validated.

citations.description: Validation source citations (DOIs or PMIDs). At least one recommended for clinical-grade workflows.

label.description: Free-text label (e.g. 'GIAB Ashkenazi trio', '1000 Genomes EUR').

population_code.description: Optional structured population code (NIH MOR taxonomy, OMOP).

age_band.description: Age range covered by the cohort.
